title: Advanced Architectures Path
description: Build fluency in Advanced Architectures inside Neural Networks by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Deep Residual Networks (ResNets)
steps.summary: Deep Residual Networks (ResNets) belongs to the Neural Networks area of AI/ML, within Advanced Architectures. It sits inside Neural Networks / Advanced Architectures. Start after Residual Networks (ResNets) and Resnets. It opens into Deep Residual Networks (ResNets) Variants and Deep Residual Networks (ResNets) Variants Extensions.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Wide Residual Networks (Wide ResNets)
steps.summary: Wide Residual Networks (Wide ResNets) belongs to the Neural Networks area of AI/ML, within Advanced Architectures. It sits inside Neural Networks / Advanced Architectures. Start after Wide Residual Networks and Residual Networks (ResNets). It opens into Wide Residual Networks (Wide ResNets) Variants and Wide Residual Networks (Wide ResNets) Extensions.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Memory Graph
steps.summary: Memory Graph belongs to the Neural Networks area of AI/ML, within Advanced Architectures. It sits inside Neural Networks / Advanced Architectures. Start after Memory Networks and Memory network. It opens into Scene Graph Memory and Knowledge Graph Memory.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Transformer-XL
steps.summary: Transformer-XL belongs to the Neural Networks area of AI/ML, within Advanced Architectures. It sits inside Neural Networks / Advanced Architectures. Start after Transformer and Q-Transformer. It opens into Transformer-XL-Base and Funnel-Transformer-XL.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Capsule Routing
steps.summary: Capsule Routing belongs to the Neural Networks area of AI/ML, within Advanced Architectures. It sits inside Neural Networks / Advanced Architectures. Start after Capsule Network and Capsule Networks. It opens into Capsule Routing Techniques and Capsule Networks Advanced Routing.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Swin Transformer
steps.summary: Swin Transformer belongs to the Neural Networks area of AI/ML, within Advanced Architectures. It sits inside Neural Networks / Advanced Architectures. Start after Transformer and Q-Transformer. It opens into Video Swin Transformer and semantic segmentation with Swin Transformer.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Vision Transformer
steps.summary: Vision Transformer belongs to the Neural Networks area of AI/ML, within Advanced Architectures. It sits inside Neural Networks / Advanced Architectures. Start after Transformer and Q-Transformer. It opens into Vision Transformer (ViT) and Pyramid Vision Transformer.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Switch Transformer
steps.summary: Switch Transformer belongs to the Neural Networks area of AI/ML, within Advanced Architectures. It sits inside Neural Networks / Advanced Architectures. Start after Transformer and Q-Transformer. It opens into Switch-Transformer-1T and Switch-Transformer-1.6T.
